docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELLOVIN, REBECCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EBERHART, BRANDON $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,810.00, STATUTORY DAMAGES($1800.00) ARE AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR A RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELLOVIN, REBECCA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BELLOVIN, REBECCA AS TO DEFENDANT EBERHART, BRANDON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
